name: Jhinga Vindaloo (Prawn Vindaloo)
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the cumin seeds with the ginger, garlic, and curry leaves.
2. Heat oil in a pan, add onion and curry leaves, and fry until the onion is golden.
3. Add tomatoes, chili powder, turmeric, and 2 tablespoons water; cook, mashing the tomatoes with the back of a wooden spoon to form a thick paste.
4. Add crushed spices and continue frying for 5 minutes. Add prawns and 2 tablespoons water; simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Pour in vinegar. If needed, thicken the sauce by stirring cornflour mixed with 1 teaspoon water. Season with salt and sugar, if desired.
